  • Mentorship opportunities
  • Masterclasses and professional training
  • Career development support
  • Networking with UN professionals
  • Duty-related travel and training allocation

The programme is specifically designed to prepare young professionals for future international careers within the UN system.

IFAD Partnership Analyst (Member State Engagement) – Rome, Italy

The International Fund for Agricultural Development (IFAD) is also recruiting a Junior Professional Officer for the position of Partnership Analyst (Member State Engagement) based in Rome, Italy.

About IFAD

IFAD is a specialized United Nations agency and international financial institution dedicated to eradicating rural poverty and hunger worldwide.

The organization invests in rural communities and supports initiatives aimed at:

  • Increasing agricultural productivity
  • Improving rural incomes
  • Strengthening food systems
  • Supporting rural transformation
  • Promoting sustainable development

About the IFAD External Relations Department (ERD)

The selected JPO will work within the Global Engagement, Partnership and Resource Mobilization Division (GPR) of IFAD’s External Relations Department.

This division focuses on:

  • Partnership building
  • Resource mobilization
  • Global policy engagement
  • Strategic communications
  • Donor relations
  • International cooperation

Responsibilities of the IFAD Partnership Analyst

The selected candidate will support IFAD’s collaboration with donor countries and strategic partners.

Main responsibilities include:

Partnership Development

  • Identifying new collaboration opportunities
  • Supporting strategic engagement with Member States
  • Building partnerships with foundations, corporations, and development actors

Resource Mobilization

  • Supporting donor engagement
  • Monitoring funding opportunities
  • Maintaining partnership databases
  • Supporting replenishment efforts

Policy Engagement and Outreach

  • Organizing workshops and conferences
  • Preparing briefing notes and talking points
  • Supporting high-level meetings and international events

Strategic Analysis

  • Conducting research on development cooperation
  • Analyzing donor priorities
  • Monitoring global policy trends

Focus Areas: Mattei Plan for Africa and Global Gateway

The position specifically supports collaboration linked to:

  • Italy’s Mattei Plan for Africa
  • The European Union’s Global Gateway initiative

These initiatives aim to strengthen sustainable investment, development partnerships, and infrastructure cooperation across Africa.

Qualifications Required for the IFAD Position

Education

Applicants must possess an advanced university degree in:

  • International Development
  • International Relations
  • Political Science
  • Public Policy
  • Economics
  • Business Management
  • Social Sciences
  • Related disciplines

Experience

  • Minimum 2 years of progressively relevant experience
  • Experience in partnership development or resource mobilization
  • Experience in multicultural environments is highly desirable

Desired Skills

  • Partnership building
  • Stakeholder engagement
  • Strategic communication
  • Advocacy
  • Data management
  • Problem-solving
  • Diplomacy and negotiation

Language Requirement

  • Excellent English required
  • French, Spanish, or Arabic considered an advantage

Learning Opportunities at IFAD

The selected JPO will benefit from:

  • On-the-job training
  • Coaching from senior professionals
  • International missions
  • Exposure to donor engagement processes
  • Experience in global development financing
  • Training organized by IFAD and external providers

The programme also offers strong exposure to international development diplomacy and multilateral cooperation.

Why These Opportunities Are Important

Both positions offer exceptional exposure to international development work and represent valuable pathways into long-term careers within the United Nations system.

Successful applicants will gain:

  • International experience
  • Exposure to global policymaking
  • Professional mentorship
  • Multilateral development expertise
  • Leadership and communication skills
  • Opportunities to contribute to sustainable development

These opportunities are especially ideal for young professionals passionate about:

  • Human rights
  • Governance
  • Rural development
  • Food security
  • International cooperation
  • Policy analysis
  • Sustainable development

 

Apply here
